system.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration System
system.description: Complete autonomous agent system for full-stack development with orchestration

orchestrator.name: Master Orchestrator Agent
orchestrator.role: Central workflow coordinator and task manager
orchestrator.description: Manages all agents, schedules tasks, resolves dependencies, and ensures system health

actions.name: Create Workflow
actions.description: Initialize a new workflow with defined tasks and dependencies

actions.name: Assign Task to Agent
actions.description: Assign a task to the most suitable agent based on skills and availability

actions.name: Monitor Agent Health
actions.description: Check health status of all agents and report issues

actions.name: Resolve Task Dependency
actions.description: Check and resolve dependencies between tasks

actions.name: Handle Agent Conflict
actions.description: Resolve conflicts when multiple agents work on same resource

actions.name: Generate System Report
actions.description: Generate comprehensive report on system status and agent performance

event_handlers.handler: Log failure, implement retry, escalate if needed

agents.name: Frontend Expert Agent
agents.description: Creates responsive UI components, pages, and integrates frontend with backend APIs

actions.name: Create Component
actions.description: Build a reusable React component with props and styling

actions.name: Create Page
actions.description: Build a full page with multiple components and routing

actions.name: Integrate API Endpoint
actions.description: Connect frontend component to backend API

actions.name: Generate Hero Section
actions.description: Create hero banner with image, text, and CTA

actions.name: Create Product Listing
actions.description: Build product grid/list with filtering and pagination

actions.name: Build Form Component
actions.description: Create form with validation and submission handling

actions.name: Optimize Performance
actions.description: Implement code splitting, lazy loading, and caching

agents.name: Backend Expert Agent
agents.description: Designs database schemas, creates RESTful APIs, implements business logic

actions.name: Create Database Schema
actions.description: Design and create database tables with relationships

actions.name: Create API Endpoint
actions.description: Build FastAPI endpoint with route, validation, and documentation

actions.name: Implement Authentication
actions.description: Set up JWT authentication with login/signup endpoints

actions.name: Create CRUD Endpoints
actions.description: Generate complete CRUD operations for an entity

actions.name: Implement Validation
actions.description: Create data validation schemas and error handling

actions.name: Optimize Database Query
actions.description: Analyze and optimize slow database queries

actions.name: Setup Caching
actions.description: Implement Redis caching for frequently accessed data

agents.name: Git Expert Agent
agents.description: Manages Git repository, branching, merging, CI/CD pipelines, and deployments

actions.name: Create Feature Branch
actions.description: Create a new branch for feature development

actions.name: Commit Code Changes
actions.description: Commit code with proper message and formatting

actions.name: Create Pull Request
actions.description: Create PR with description and linking to issues

actions.name: Resolve Merge Conflict
actions.description: Automatically resolve or guide resolution of merge conflicts

actions.name: Setup CI/CD Pipeline
actions.description: Create or update GitHub Actions workflow

actions.name: Deploy to Environment
actions.description: Deploy code to staging or production environment

actions.name: Rollback Deployment
actions.description: Rollback to previous version in case of issues

agents.name: Product Management Agent
agents.role: Product Data Management and Catalog Operations
agents.description: Manages product data, CRUD operations, pricing, inventory, and image handling

actions.name: Create Product
actions.description: Add new product to catalog with all details

actions.name: Update Product
actions.description: Modify existing product information

actions.name: Delete Product
actions.description: Remove product from catalog

actions.name: Manage Inventory
actions.description: Update stock levels and handle inventory alerts

actions.name: Process Product Image
actions.description: Upload, optimize, and process product images

actions.name: Bulk Product Operation
actions.description: Perform bulk operations on multiple products

agents.name: Admin Dashboard Agent
agents.description: Builds admin dashboard, user management, analytics, and reporting features

actions.name: Create Admin Dashboard
actions.description: Build main admin dashboard with KPIs and quick actions

actions.name: Build User Management Page
actions.description: Create user listing, editing, and permission management interface

actions.name: Generate Analytics Report
actions.description: Create analytics view with charts and metrics

actions.name: Implement RBAC
actions.description: Setup role-based access control with permissions

actions.name: Create Admin Form
actions.description: Build form for admin operations (add user, update settings, etc)

agents.name: User Dashboard Agent
agents.description: Builds user dashboard, profile management, order tracking, and user interactions

actions.name: Build User Dashboard
actions.description: Create personalized user dashboard with order history and recommendations

actions.name: Create Profile Management
actions.description: Build user profile editing interface

actions.name: Implement Order Tracking
actions.description: Create order history and tracking interface

actions.name: Build Notification System
actions.description: Create notification display and preferences

actions.name: Create Wishlist Feature
actions.description: Build wishlist management interface

agents.name: Monitoring & Inspector Agent
agents.description: Monitors all agents, verifies code quality, runs tests, and reports issues

actions.name: Monitor Agent Health
actions.description: Check health status of all agents

actions.name: Run Tests
actions.description: Execute unit, integration, and E2E tests

actions.name: Check Code Quality
actions.description: Analyze code for quality issues and best practices

actions.name: Verify Performance
actions.description: Check performance metrics and identify bottlenecks

actions.name: Generate Report
actions.description: Create comprehensive system health and performance report

actions.name: Detect Issues
actions.description: Scan for errors, warnings, and anomalies

workflows.name: Feature Development Workflow
workflows.description: Complete workflow for developing a new feature

workflows.name: Product Launch Workflow
workflows.description: Workflow for launching a new product
